description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-badge` (T1-19). 5/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-badge/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant typing (info/success/warning/error/neutral), size typing, count/max props
2. Accessibility — badge content must be accessible (not just visual color), `aria-label` when badge conveys status not in text, pulse animation must respect `prefers-reduced-motion`, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants, count display, max value truncation (e.g. 99+), empty/dot mode, pulse animation
4. Storybook — all variants, count demos, dot mode, pulse mode
5. CSS — color variants using `--hx-*` semantic tokens (no hardcoded colors), CSS parts (base)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be tiny)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, status conveyed in text not just color

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-badge/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-badge — T1-19 antagonistic quality review
